title: Amauropelta linkiana
taxonomy: Amauropelta linkiana is classified within the family Thelypteridaceae, which is a family of ferns commonly known as the marsh fern family. This family belongs to the order Polypodiales and the class Polypodiopsida. Amauropelta linkiana further falls under the genus Amauropelta, which is a monotypic genus of ferns. The species Amauropelta linkiana is native to Brazil and is a relatively rare species of fern. It is known for its distinctive fronds and unique habitat requirements.
